tasks.title: Generate DB migration for averageRating columns with backfill
tasks.description:
Generate a Drizzle migration adding `average_rating` to both `accommodation_reviews` and `destination_reviews`. Include backfill SQL:

```sql
-- Backfill accommodation_reviews (6 dimensions)
UPDATE accommodation_reviews SET average_rating = (
    (COALESCE((rating->>'cleanliness')::numeric, 0) +
     COALESCE((rating->>'hospitality')::numeric, 0) +
     COALESCE((rating->>'services')::numeric, 0) +
     COALESCE((rating->>'accuracy')::numeric, 0) +
     COALESCE((rating->>'communication')::numeric, 0) +
     COALESCE((rating->>'location')::numeric, 0)) / 6.0
);

-- Backfill destination_reviews (18 dimensions)
UPDATE destination_reviews SET average_rating = COALESCE(
    (SELECT AVG(val::numeric) FROM jsonb_each_text(rating) AS kv(key, val) WHERE val IS NOT NULL), 0
) WHERE rating IS NOT NULL;
```

Run `pnpm db:generate` to create migration, then add backfill SQL manually.

subtasks.title: Run pnpm db:generate to create migration

tasks.title: Add _gte/_lte suffix handling to buildWhereClause
tasks.description:
In `packages/db/src/utils/drizzle-helpers.ts`:

1. Add `gte`, `lte` to the import from `drizzle-orm`
2. Add `_gte` suffix handling in `buildWhereClause` (before the final `eq()` fallback)
3. Add `_lte` suffix handling (same pattern)

Both follow the existing `_like` pattern: strip suffix, check column exists, return operator or undefined.

File: `packages/db/src/utils/drizzle-helpers.ts`

subtasks.title: Add gte, lte to drizzle-orm imports
Add _gte suffix handling before eq() fallback
Add _lte suffix handling before eq() fallback

tasks.title: Add buildSearchCondition() utility function
tasks.description:
Add a new exported function `buildSearchCondition()` to `packages/db/src/utils/drizzle-helpers.ts` that builds an OR condition across multiple columns using ILIKE.

Also add `or` to the import from `drizzle-orm`.

Signature:
```ts
export function buildSearchCondition(
    term: string,
    columns: readonly string[],
    table: unknown
): SQL | undefined
```

Logic: Filter valid columns, build `ilike(col, '%term%')` for each, combine with `or()`. Return undefined for empty term or no valid columns.

File: `packages/db/src/utils/drizzle-helpers.ts`

tasks.title: Tests for _gte/_lte operators in buildWhereClause
tasks.description:
Add unit tests for the new `_gte` and `_lte` suffix handling in `buildWhereClause`.

Test cases:
- `{ createdAt_gte: date }` produces `>=` condition
- `{ createdAt_lte: date }` produces `<=` condition
- `{ price_gte: 100 }` works with numbers
- `{ nonExistent_gte: date }` is silently skipped (column not found)
- `{ nonExistent_lte: date }` is silently skipped
- Combined with existing operators: `{ name_like: 'foo', createdAt_gte: date }`

File: `packages/db/test/utils/drizzle-helpers.test.ts`

tasks.title: Tests for buildSearchCondition() function
tasks.description:
Add unit tests for `buildSearchCondition()`.

Test cases:
- Single column: returns ilike condition
- Multiple columns: returns OR of ilike conditions
- Empty term: returns undefined
- Whitespace-only term: returns undefined
- Non-existent columns: silently skipped
- All columns non-existent: returns undefined
- Special characters in term (%, _): passed through (known limitation)

File: `packages/db/test/utils/drizzle-helpers.test.ts`

subtasks.title: Test edge cases (empty, whitespace, missing columns)

tasks.title: Add getTable() public method to BaseModel
Add additionalConditions parameter to BaseModel.findAll()
tasks.description:
Extend `findAll()` in `packages/db/src/base/base.model.ts` to accept an optional `additionalConditions?: SQL[]` parameter.

Combine `buildWhereClause(where, table)` with `additionalConditions` using `and()`.

The same combined where clause must be used for BOTH the main query AND the count query inside `findAll()` so pagination totals are accurate.

Import `and` from `drizzle-orm` if not already imported.

File: `packages/db/src/base/base.model.ts`

subtasks.title: Add additionalConditions parameter to findAll signature
Combine base where clause with additionalConditions via and()
Apply combined clause to both query and count

tasks.title: Refactor BaseModel.count() to use options object
tasks.description:
Refactor `count()` signature from `count(where, tx?)` to `count(where, options?: { additionalConditions?: SQL[]; tx?: Transaction })`.

Combine `additionalConditions` with the base where clause using `and()`, same as `findAll()`.

File: `packages/db/src/base/base.model.ts`

**IMPORTANT**: Do NOT migrate callers yet - that's T-024.

Ensure backward compat with count(where) (no options)

tasks.title: Fix search OR bug in list() method
tasks.description:
In `packages/service-core/src/base/base.crud.read.ts`:

1. Import `buildSearchCondition` from `@repo/db/utils/drizzle-helpers` and `SQL` type from `drizzle-orm`
2. Replace the buggy AND-based search logic (for-loop adding `col_like` keys to where) with `buildSearchCondition()` call
3. Pass resulting SQL condition as `additionalConditions` to `model.findAll()` and `model.findAllWithRelations()`

Current (buggy): `for (const col of searchColumns) { whereClause[col_like] = search; }`
Fixed: `searchCondition = buildSearchCondition(search, searchColumns, this.model.getTable())`

File: `packages/service-core/src/base/base.crud.read.ts`

subtasks.title: Replace AND search loop with buildSearchCondition call
Pass searchCondition as additionalConditions to findAll
Pass searchCondition as additionalConditions to findAllWithRelations

tasks.title: Implement adminList() method on BaseCrudRead
tasks.description:
Add the `adminList()` public method to `BaseCrudRead` class in `packages/service-core/src/base/base.crud.read.ts`.

Method responsibilities:
1. Check `this.adminSearchSchema` exists (throw CONFIGURATION_ERROR if not)
2. Validate params against adminSearchSchema
3. Permission check via `_canList(actor)`
4. Destructure base fields: page, pageSize, search, sort, status, includeDeleted, createdAfter, createdBefore
5. Parse sort string via `parseAdminSort()`
6. Validate sort field against table columns
7. Build where clause: status -> lifecycleState, deletedAt, createdAt_gte/_lte
8. Build search OR condition via `buildSearchCondition()`
9. Delegate to `_executeAdminSearch()`

Wrapped in `runWithLoggingAndValidation()`.

File: `packages/service-core/src/base/base.crud.read.ts`

Import `parseAdminSort` from `@repo/schemas`, `ServiceErrorCode`, `buildSearchCondition` from `@repo/db`.

tasks.title: Implement _executeAdminSearch() default method on BaseCrudRead
tasks.description:
Add the default `_executeAdminSearch()` protected method to `BaseCrudRead`.

Default behavior:
1. Merge `entityFilters` into `where` clause (simple eq conditions)
2. Collect `additionalConditions`: search SQL + extraConditions
3. Check `getDefaultListRelations()` for relations
4. Call `model.findAllWithRelations()` or `model.findAll()` accordingly
5. Return paginated result

File: `packages/service-core/src/base/base.crud.read.ts`

- Extract `minPrice`, `maxPrice` from `entityFilters`
- Build SQL: `(accommodation.price->>'price')::numeric >= minPrice` / `<= maxPrice`
- Pass remaining simple filters (type, destinationId, ownerId, isFeatured) to `super._executeAdminSearch()`
- No VIP/excludeRestricted filter (admin sees everything)

- Build SQL: `(event.date->>'start')::timestamptz >= startDateAfter` etc.
- Note: JSONB keys are `start` and `end` (from EventDateSchema), NOT `startDate`/`endDate`
- Pass remaining simple filters (category, locationId, organizerId, authorId, isFeatured) to super

tasks.title: [GAP-001] Fix sort format mismatch: frontend sends JSON array, backend expects field:dir

subtasks.title: Update createEntityApi.ts to send field:dir format
Verify admin DataTable sorting works end-to-end

tasks.title: [GAP-009] Fix sponsorship status filter: frontend sends 'status', backend expects 'sponsorshipStatus'
tasks.description:
GAP found in audit. Admin SponsorshipsTab sends filter as 'status' param but SponsorshipAdminSearchSchema expects 'sponsorshipStatus'. Base AdminSearchBaseSchema also has a 'status' field (maps to lifecycleState). The sponsorship table has no lifecycleState column, so the base status filter is silently ignored AND the entity-specific sponsorshipStatus is never sent.

Fix in apps/admin/src/features/sponsorships/components/SponsorshipsTab.tsx: Change the filter parameter name from 'status' to 'sponsorshipStatus'.

Also check apps/admin/src/features/sponsorships/hooks/ for any query parameter references.

Files: apps/admin/src/features/sponsorships/components/SponsorshipsTab.tsx

subtasks.title: Update SponsorshipsTab to use sponsorshipStatus param name
Verify sponsorship filtering works in admin panel

tasks.title: [GAP-004] Document toString() usage in review rating gte/lte comparisons
tasks.description:
GAP found in audit. AccommodationReviewService (line 181) and DestinationReviewService (line 159) call minRating.toString() before passing to gte(). Since Drizzle numeric() maps to string in TS, this is technically correct but undocumented and potentially confusing.

Add JSDoc comments explaining WHY toString() is needed (Drizzle numeric type is string in TS).

Files:
- packages/service-core/src/services/accommodationReview/accommodationReview.service.ts
- packages/service-core/src/services/destinationReview/destinationReview.service.ts

subtasks.title: Add comment to AccommodationReviewService explaining toString() reason
Add comment to DestinationReviewService explaining toString() reason
